1 = Medicare-defined Amount 
2 = Plan-defined Amount 
3 = No ICL 

COMMENT: The Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit is also referred to as the coverage gap. 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from 
reporting plan benefit package information.
